mermaid_flowchart:
{"viz_type": "mermaid_flowchart", "viz_dsl": "graph LR
    A[Vice-Admiral Ravindra Sethi] -->|Retired Indian Navy Flag Officer| B(Western Naval Command)
    B -->|Authorized Operation Trident-II in| C[December 1971]
    C -->|Launched missile-boat strike against| D[Karachi Harbour Oil Depot]
    D -->|Located in| E[Karachi, Sindh, Pakistan]"}

{"viz_type": "mermaid_flowchart", "viz_dsl": "graph TD H[Direct Preference Optimization
Loss Function] H -->|Replaces| P1[KL-Penalized RLHF Reward Loop] H -->|Operates on| P2[Pairs of Chosen vs Rejected Completions] H -->|Reparameterizes Reward as| P3[Implicit Reward = beta * log
policy ratio over reference] H -->|Optimizes via| P4[Standard Cross-Entropy on Preference Pairs] H -->|Avoids Need for| P5[Separate Reward Model Training] H -->|Reported to Match or Exceed| P6[PPO-Based RLHF on Helpful-Harmless Benchmarks]"}

{"viz_type": "mermaid_flowchart", "viz_dsl": "graph TD
    subgraph Method_A ["Latent Diffusion with Cross-Attention Conditioning"]
        direction TB
        A1[Input: Text Prompt + Reference Image] --> B1[CLIP Text Encoder]
        B1 --> C1[Cross-Attention Block in U-Net]
        C1 --> D1[Iterative Denoising over 50 Steps]
        D1 --> E1[Output: 512x512 Synthesized Image]
    end

    subgraph Method_B ["Flow-Matching with Direct Conditioning"]
        direction TB
        A2[Input: Text Prompt + Reference Image] --> B2[T5-XL Text Encoder]
        B2 --> C2[Concatenated Conditioning at Block Input]
        C2 --> D2[Single-Step ODE Integration]
        D2 --> E2[Output: 1024x1024 Synthesized Image]
    end

    style Method_A fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#01579b,stroke-width:2px
    style Method_B fill:#f3e5f5,stroke:#4a148c,stroke-width:2px
    style C1 fill:#bbdefb,stroke:#01579b
    style C2 fill:#e1bee7,stroke:#4a148c"}
mermaid_mindmap:
{"viz_type": "mermaid_mindmap", "viz_dsl": "mindmap root((Cipher Saga
Lead-Cast Comparison)) Marielle Vasquez Role: Captain Sera Halvorsen Status: Original Protagonist Timeline: Franchise launched 2009 Note: Departed before Cipher Saga III after creative dispute Theo Lindqvist Role: Captain Sera Halvorsen Status: Recast Protagonist Timeline: Cipher Saga III–V (2014–2019) Background: Stage actor (Royal Court Theatre) Significance: Stayed for the trilogy that closed the original arc"}

{"viz_type": "mermaid_mindmap", "viz_dsl": "mindmap
  root((Three Recent Papers by Core ML Challenge))
    Distribution Shift Under Sparse Labels
      Adaptive Pseudo-Labeling for Streaming Sensor Data
        Challenge: Concept drift in unlabeled sensor streams
        Solution: Confidence-thresholded pseudo-label injection with EMA teacher
    Long-Tail Multi-Modal Retrieval
      Cross-Modal Contrastive Tail Boosting
        Challenge: Tail-class collapse in joint vision-language embedding space
        Solution: Per-class temperature scaling with hard-negative mining from text neighbours
    Causal Stability of Foundation Models
      Counterfactual Probe Suite for Pretrained Encoders
        Challenge: Spurious feature reliance under covariate shift
        Solution: Causal probing toolkit with intervention sets and stability index"}

{"viz_type": "mermaid_mindmap", "viz_dsl": "mindmap root((Parameter Update Mechanisms
(Two Recent RL Methods))) In-Context Adapter Tuning Optimization Target Cross-entropy on next-token prediction Self-supervised, no reward model Updated Weights Lightweight adapter layers only (~0.4% of params) Frozen backbone for compute efficiency Update Procedure Single forward-backward per chunk of 512 tokens Update Rule theta_adapter <- theta_adapter - eta * grad_L_NTP eta scheduled with cosine decay Distinctive Property No architectural changes to the base model Drop-in replacement for full fine-tuning Distributional Policy Alignment Optimization Target Reverse-KL between policy and target distribution q Reward-weighted, derived from preference scores Target Distribution q_i proportional to p_old_i * exp(u_i / tau) u_i: standardized preference scores Update Procedure Cross-entropy fitting to q over batches of 8 candidates Gradient on Policy Logits dL/dl_i = p_theta_i - q_i Distinctive Property Decouples target construction from policy fitting Gradient vanishes once policy matches target q"}
mermaid_sequenceDiagram:
{"viz_type": "mermaid_sequenceDiagram", "viz_dsl": "sequenceDiagram
    participant Client as Browser Client
    participant Auth as Carrillon Identity Provider
    Client->>Auth: POST /authorize (response_type=code, PKCE challenge)
    Auth-->>Client: 302 Redirect to Login Form
    Client->>Auth: POST /login (credentials + PKCE verifier)
    Auth-->>Client: 302 Redirect with Authorization Code
    Client->>Auth: POST /token (code + PKCE verifier)
    Auth-->>Client: 200 OK (access_token, id_token, refresh_token)"}

{"viz_type": "mermaid_sequenceDiagram", "viz_dsl": "sequenceDiagram
    participant Trainer as Training Loop
    participant Policy as Policy Model (7B)
    participant Reward as Reward Model (Frozen 13B)
    participant Ref as Reference Model (SFT Snapshot)
    Note over Trainer,Ref: Single PPO step on a 256-prompt minibatch
    Trainer->>Policy: Sample 4 completions per prompt (temp=1.0)
    activate Policy
    Policy-->>Trainer: 1024 candidate completions
    deactivate Policy
    Trainer->>Reward: Score each completion under helpful-harmless reward head
    activate Reward
    Reward-->>Trainer: Scalar reward per completion
    deactivate Reward
    Trainer->>Ref: Compute log-prob under reference policy
    Ref-->>Trainer: Reference log-probs for KL penalty
    Note right of Trainer: Advantage = reward - beta * KL(policy || ref)
    Trainer->>Policy: Apply clipped PPO gradient update"}

{"viz_type": "mermaid_sequenceDiagram", "viz_dsl": "sequenceDiagram
    participant Orchestrator as DocViz Orchestrator
    participant Capacity as Capacity Analyzer
    participant Classifier as Visualization Classifier
    participant Architect as Content Architect
    Orchestrator->>Capacity: Submit segmented document chunks
    par Parallel preprocessing
        Capacity-->>Orchestrator: chunk_capacity_scores (per-chunk visualization budget)
    and
        Orchestrator->>Classifier: Submit same chunks for viz_type proposal
        Classifier-->>Orchestrator: viz_type proposals (with confidence)
    end
    Orchestrator->>Architect: Joined chunks + capacity + viz_type proposals
    Architect-->>Orchestrator: Per-visualization render plan (DSL skeleton + caption draft)"}

{"viz_type": "mermaid_flowchart", "viz_dsl": "graph TD %% chain section: career trajectory A[Dr. Naomi Castellan
PhD Cambridge 2014] -->|Postdoc 2014–2017 at| B[Stanford NLP Group] B -->|Joined as Senior Research Scientist in 2017| C[Foundry Research Institute] C -->|Promoted in 2021 to lead the| D[Alignment & Evaluation Team] %% hub-and-spoke section: the team's flagship contribution D -->|Co-led publication of| H[Calibrated Self-Critique
NeurIPS 2023 Best Paper] H -->|Introduced metric| P1[Self-Critique Calibration Index] H -->|Reframed evaluation as| P2[Two-Step Generation-then-Refutation] H -->|Demonstrated SOTA on| P3[TruthfulQA and HaluEval-Hard] H -->|Released open implementation as| P4[csc-eval Python Package] %% subgraph-cluster section: follow-up ecosystem subgraph Followup [Follow-Up Work Citing Castellan et al 2023] direction LR F1[Iterative Self-Critique with RLHF Reward

consolidated.mermaid_mindmap:
{"viz_type": "mermaid_mindmap", "viz_dsl": "mindmap root((Foundry Research Institute
Alignment Programme — 2024 Snapshot)) Team Lead: Dr. Naomi Castellan Headcount: 12 researchers and 3 engineers Funding: Mixed government and philanthropic grants Milestones 2022 Q3 Pilot Release Open-sourced csc-eval calibration toolkit Adopted by three external academic groups within six months 2023 NeurIPS Best Paper Calibrated Self-Critique Cited 480+ times by end of 2024 2024 Public Audit Programme Quarterly third-party model cards published Independent reviewer panel rotated yearly Methods Calibrated Self-Critique Optimization Target Cross-entropy on critique-vs-base preference pairs Auxiliary calibration loss on confidence bins Updated Weights Critic head only (~1.2% of base model params) Base model frozen during critique training Update Rule theta_critic <- theta_critic - eta * grad_L_calib L_calib = CE_pref + lambda * ECE_bin Refusal-Aware Reward Modelling Optimization Target Pairwise reward with explicit refusal class KL anchor to safety-tuned reference policy Updated Weights Full reward head and bottom 4 transformer blocks Anchor model frozen for KL computation Update Rule theta_rm <- theta_rm - eta * grad_L_pref plus beta * KL(pi_theta || pi_ref)"}
consolidated.mermaid_sequenceDiagram:
{"viz_type": "mermaid_sequenceDiagram", "viz_dsl": "sequenceDiagram
    participant Reader as Research Assistant
    participant Foundry as Foundry Research Portal
    participant DOI as DOI Resolver Service
    participant Repo as Open-Access Repository
    Note over Reader,Repo: End-to-end paper retrieval initiated by a single citation
    Reader->>Foundry: Submit citation string (Castellan et al., NeurIPS 2023)
    activate Foundry
    Foundry->>DOI: Resolve canonical DOI from citation metadata
    DOI-->>Foundry: doi:10.4242/neurips.2023.castellan-csc
    deactivate Foundry
    Note right of Foundry: DOI cached for 24h to avoid resolver hammering
    par Concurrent fetch of artifacts
        Foundry->>Repo: GET /papers/{doi}/manuscript.pdf
        Repo-->>Foundry: 200 OK (PDF bytes, 4.1 MB)
    and
        Foundry->>Repo: GET /papers/{doi}/supplementary.zip
        Repo-->>Foundry: 200 OK (ZIP bytes, 18.6 MB)
    and
        Foundry->>Repo: GET /papers/{doi}/citation-graph.json
        Repo-->>Foundry: 200 OK (forward + backward citations, 312 records)
    end
    activate Foundry
    Foundry-->>Reader: Bundle (PDF + supplement + citation graph) ready for download
    deactivate Foundry
    Note over Reader: Reader can now open manuscript and traverse forward citations offline"}
consolidated.mermaid_timeline:
{"viz_type": "mermaid_timeline", "viz_dsl": "timeline title Foundry Research Institute — Founding to 2025 Operating Cadence section 1998–2007 Founding Era 1998 : Founded as the Foundry Lab inside Whitfield University 2003 : Spun out as an independent 501c3 research institute 2007 : Moved to its current Bay Campus
Endowment crossed $40M for the first time section 2014 Expansion Year 2014 : Opened Cape Halverton satellite office 2014 : Hired first VP of Research
Dr Naomi Castellan recruited from Stanford 2014 : Launched Open Science Programme section 2024 by Quarter Q1 2024 : Calibrated Self-Critique v2.0 Public Release Q1 2024 : csc-eval Conformance Test Suite Q2 2024 : Quarterly Public Audit Report Spring Edition Q3 2024 : Refusal-Aware RM Workshop at NeurIPS Q4 2024 : Quarterly Public Audit Report Winter Edition section 2025 Recurring Cadence 2025 : Annual Research Symposium first Monday of February 2025 : Open-House Demonstration Day last Friday of June 2025 : Independent Reviewer Panel rotation mid-October "}
